title: hash or trxnid (incoming)
description: asking for context when missing funds sent to Edge

actions.value:
Do you have any information from the sending wallet?


The Transaction ID (Hash) would be ideal to help locate this transaction on-chain. Also let us know which asset was sent, and which specific wallet was used to receive with, in your Edge account.
